name: Teak Alqaws · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: In the heat of combat, a random stat is increased by 2000 for 10 seconds.

name: Wootz Kilij · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity

name: Mirage Longbow · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become a Master of Illusion for 10 seconds. As a Master of Illusion you will summon an illusion of yourself to fight for you, attacking your enemies. Be forewarned, Illusion magic can occasionally produce fixed results! A Master of Illusion also does 3% more damage, which increases by 10% against enemies with Shields and Temp HP. You can only be Master of Illusion once every 30 seconds.
notes: Artifact Equipment; Ascended Weapon Sets of the Hunter

name: Mirage Axes · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity

name: Fey Longbow · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become Fey-Touched, which restores 10% of your HP, as well as increases your Base Damage Boost by 3% and your Overall Outgoing Healing by 6% for 10 seconds. You can only be Fey-Touched once every 30 seconds.

name: Fey Axes · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity

name: Lifeforged Longbow · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become Fortified, which increases your Defense by 5% and adds 10% of your Defense to your Power for 10 seconds. You can only be Fortified once every 30 seconds.

name: Lifeforged Axes · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity

name: Aboleth Longbow · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter power, you become Far-Influenced, which increases your Outgoing Damage by 4% and grants you a random buff for 10 seconds. Relentless — increases your Critical Strike by 2500. Tainted Attack — Enemies you attack will take additional damage over time. Impeding Damage — Enemies you attack will explode on death, doing damage to other foes. You can only be Far-Influenced once every 30 seconds.

name: Aboleth Axes · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity

name: Trailblazer's Longbow · IL 350
setBonus: 2 of Set: If you dodge, block, sprint or shadow slip, you gain Overcharge, which decreases your Incoming Damage by 10% and increases your Movement Speed by 15% for 10 seconds. If you use an Encounter power, you gain Overcharge: Attack, which increases your Outgoing Damage by 10% and heals you 15% of your max HP for 10 seconds. You can only activate an Overcharge power once every 30 seconds.

name: Trailblazer's Axes · IL 350
notes: Artifact Equipment; Artifact Stat Increase: Unlocks at Epic Rarity
